title: ChapterIntent
description: Preparer output — chapter intent document generated before writing. Mirrors ChapterIntentSchema in input-governance.ts.

goal.description: One-sentence summary of what this chapter must accomplish narratively.

outlineNode.description: Reference to the volume outline node this chapter fulfills (optional).

sceneDirective.description: Scene-level creative direction as a single descriptive string (optional).

arcDirective.description: Character arc direction for this chapter (e.g. 'protagonist faces self-doubt after defeat, begins to reassess approach').

moodDirective.description: Emotional trajectory instruction (e.g. 'start hopeful, shift to dread by mid-chapter').

titleDirective.description: Suggested chapter title or title pattern (optional).

mustKeep.description: Elements that must be preserved or referenced in this chapter.

mustAvoid.description: Elements to explicitly avoid in this chapter.

styleEmphasis.description: Style notes for this chapter (e.g. 'use short sentences for action scenes').

resolution.description: How this conflict should resolve within the chapter.

detail.description: Optional additional context about the conflict.

hookAgenda.description: Hook management plan for this chapter. Mirrors HookAgendaSchema in input-governance.ts.

pressureMap.description: Per-hook pressure assignments for this chapter.

blockSiblingHooks.description: If true, prevent other hooks in the same family from advancing in this chapter.

mustAdvance.description: Hook IDs that must be advanced in this chapter (mandatory).

eligibleResolve.description: Hook IDs that are eligible for resolution if the narrative allows it.

staleDebt.description: Hook IDs with overdue payoffs that should be addressed to prevent reader frustration.

avoidNewHookFamilies.description: Hook family categories to avoid introducing new hooks in.
